title: Flamingo - Software update for just headset
scenario: Headset-only DFU completes successfully when both headset and charge case firmware updates are available via separate Update buttons in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate your connected headset device.
3. Tap the Update button on the device card on the Home screen.
4. Observe that the Device Settings screen opens with the Software Update tab expanded.
5. Verify that an "Update All" button is displayed at the top of the Software Update section.
6. Verify that separate "Update" buttons are shown for the headset and the charge case.
7. Tap the "Update" button next to the headset (not the charge case).
8. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the headset.
expected: The DFU process for just the headset completes successfully. Only the headset is updated to the latest firmware. The charge case firmware remains unchanged.
